Localization.Description: Suspicious authentication in the FreeIPA domain. Authentication data differ from the previously collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: New user "{subject.account.name}" from host {src.host} logged in to a computer in the FreeIPA domain on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User "{subject.account.name}" from new host {src.host} logged in to a computer in the FreeIPA domain on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
